feed.subtitle: De la paix, à la lisière de la vie
feed.title: EchoesFromShell

entry.content:
A first keystroke in the silent shell.
EchoesFromShell begins with a quiet welcome — in many languages.

English – Welcome.
中文 – 欢迎。
Français – Bienvenue.
Español – Bienvenido.
Deutsch – Willkommen.
日本語 – いらっしゃいませ。
Italiano – Benvenuto.
Português – Bem-vindo.
Русский – Добро пожаловать.
العربية – أهلاً وسهلاً
हिन्दी – स्वागत है
한국어 – 환영합니다
Nederlands – Welkom.
Polski – Witaj.
Türkçe – Hoş geldin.
Svenska – Välkommen.
Suomi – Tervetuloa.
Čeština – Vítejte.
Ελληνικά – Καλώς ήρθες.

No fanfare, just echoes.

Thank you for stopping by.
entry.summary:
A first keystroke in the silent shell.
EchoesFromShell begins with a quiet welcome — in many languages.

English –
entry.title: welcome
